Title: Identification of the dwarf gene GmDW1 in soybean (Glycine max L.) by combining mapping-by-sequencing and linkage analysis

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cyclizes ent-copalyl diphosphate to ent-kaurene in the early step of gibberellin biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: key early biosynthetic step; not explicitly established as rate-limiting
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Loss-of-function mutation in GmDW1 causes strong reduction of bioactive GA levels and produces dwarf plants with shortened internodes; exogenous GA3 rescues the phenotype.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: map-based cloning with mapping-by-sequencing and linkage analysis; co-segregation of SNP with dwarf phenotype; endogenous GA profiling by GC-MS; exogenous GA3 rescue; allelic variation association analysis; qRT-PCR expression analysis
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GmDW1 was fine-mapped to a 460-kb interval and the T1224A missense mutation in exon 3 co-segregated with the dwarf phenotype. 2. GmDW1 encodes an ent-kaurene synthase functioning in an early GA biosynthetic step. 3. dw stems lacked detectable bioactive GA1 and GA4, and GA3 treatment restored plant height, supporting GA deficiency caused by the GmDW1 mutation. 4. Additional natural allelic variants in GmDW1 were associated with reduced plant height in soybean accessions.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in root, stem, and leaf, with highest expression in stem at seedling stage.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Expressed in root, stem, and leaf of 2-week-old seedlings, highest in stem.
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Bioactive gibberellins promote stem elongation and plant height development.
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Exogenous GA3 application; uniconazole treatment; seedling stage (14 DAE); growth chamber at 25°C with 16-h light/8-h dark
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Terpene synthase family; terpene_cyclase_plant_C1 domain; terpene synthase metal-binding domain; ent-kaurene-16-synthase domain
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Whole-genome resequencing of mutant and wild-type DNA pools on Illumina HiSeq 2500; accession NA
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Dwarf plants showed dark green leaves and strongly reduced plant height/internode length.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for manipulating soybean plant height and architecture; weak or allelic variants may be valuable for breeding semi-dwarf ideotypes, but strong loss-of-function causes severe dwarfism.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The causal mutation is a T-to-A substitution at nucleotide 1224 causing Trp125Arg. Additional alleles Gmdw1-1 and Gmdw1-2 were found in soybean germplasm and associated with shorter stature.
